candidate_summary: Anabiotic LoRA: store adapter in null-space of base-model gradients; rehydrate without retraining; zero functional cost when not invoked.

results.title: Compressed Activations for Memory-Efficient LLM Training (CompAct)
results.rationale: Activation-side compression for training memory; recovery framing only partial. KW=1, cos<0.7, judge<0.7.

results.title: CompAct arxiv
results.rationale: Duplicate of CompAct NAACL. Same scoring profile; no threshold crossed.

results.title: Simple LLM Compression Recovery Using Dynamic Prompting with Theoretical Analysis
results.rationale: Direct functional analog: post-compression recovery without retraining. KW>=2, cos>=0.7, judge>=0.7 — all three thresholds satisfied.

results.title: Compression-Aware Memory Controller Design for LLM Inference
results.rationale: Hardware-side memory controller; orthogonal to adapter null-space framing.

results.title: ESPACE: Dimensionality Reduction of Activations for Model Compression
results.rationale: Activation subspace projection preserving structure — functionally adjacent to null-space orthogonalization claim. Judge>=0.7 forces hit.

results.title: Review of LLM compression 2025
results.rationale: Generic survey; mentions PEFT but no null-space/rehydration mechanism.

results.title: Awesome LLM Compression
results.rationale: Curated list; no direct mechanism match.

results.title: Desiccation Tolerance in Moss and Liverwort
results.rationale: Source-domain biology only; no LLM/adapter relevance. Single keyword insufficient.

verdict: FAIL — prior art covers the functional mechanism. 'Simple LLM Compression Recovery via Dynamic Prompting' (4nV383120k) achieves post-compression recovery without retraining; ESPACE provides activation-subspace preservation analogous to null-space framing. The 'Anabiotic LoRA' proposal is a metaphor-relabel of established compression-recovery PEFT work, not a novel mechanism.
